title: Finnish Youth Survey Autumn 1998
description: The main themes of the Finnish Youth Survey Autumn 1998 were social participation, cultural services, and political focal points. Young people's future plans, world view, and notions of various social institutions were queried. First, the respondents were asked about public political influence.
